name: Microwave Cherry Crisp
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pie filling and lemon juice in an ungreased 1 1/2 quart microwave-safe dish; set aside.
2. In a small bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, cinnamon, and allspice; cut in butter until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Add walnuts.
3. Sprinkle the crumb mixture over the filling.
4. Microwave, uncovered, on High for 5-6 minutes or until bubbly.
5. Serve warm with ice cream.
Yield: 4 servings.
